titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding a Woman Whose Husband Prevents Her From Performing the Obligatory Hajj or a Voluntary Hajj
Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding a Woman Whose Husband Prevents Her From Performing the Obligatory Hajj or a Voluntary Hajj

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اِمْرَأَةٍ لَهَا زَوْجٌ وَ هِيَ صَرُورَةٌ وَ لاَ يَأْذَنُ لَهَا فِي اَلْحَجِّ قَالَ «تَحُجُّ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَأْذَنْ لَهَا ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اِمْرَأَةٍ لَهَا زَوْجٌ وَ هِيَ صَرُورَةٌ وَ لاَ يَأْذَنُ لَهَا فِي اَلْحَجِّ قَالَ «تَحُجُّ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَأْذَنْ لَهَا ».

segments:
Hadith.2907 - Aban narrated from Zurara, from Abu Ja'far (as), who said:
I asked him about a woman who has a husband, has not performed Hajj before (ṣarūra), and her husband does not permit her to go for Hajj.
Imam (as) said: "She should perform Hajj, even if he does not permit her."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2907 - Aban narrated from Zurara, from Abu Ja'far (as), who said:
I asked him about a woman who has a husband, has not performed Hajj before (ṣarūra), and her husband does not permit her to go for Hajj.
Imam (as) said: "She should perform Hajj, even if he does not permit her."

narratorChain.raw: 2907 - رَوَى أَبَانٌ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding a Woman Whose Husband Prevents Her From Performing the Obligatory Hajj or a Voluntary Hajj

segments: رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «تَحُجُّ وَ إِنْ رَغِمَ أَنْفُهُ ».
arabic.text: رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «تَحُجُّ وَ إِنْ رَغِمَ أَنْفُهُ ».

segments:
Hadith.2908 - In a narration from Abdul-Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah, from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as),
Imam (as) said: "She should perform Hajj, even if it displeases him."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2908 - In a narration from Abdul-Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah, from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as),
Imam (as) said: "She should perform Hajj, even if it displeases him."

narratorChain.raw: وَفِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنِ الصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:

parts.text: َفِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنِ الصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding a Woman Whose Husband Prevents Her From Performing the Obligatory Hajj or a Voluntary Hajj

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ اَلْمُوسِرَةِ قَدْ حَجَّتْ حَجَّةَ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ فَتَقُولُ لِزَوْجِهَا أَ حِجَّنِي مَرَّةً أُخْرَى أَ لَهُ أَنْ يَمْنَعَهَا قَالَ «نَعَمْ يَقُولُ لَهَا حَقِّي عَلَيْكِ أَعْظَمُ مِنْ حَقِّكِ عَلَيَّ فِي ذَا ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ اَلْمُوسِرَةِ قَدْ حَجَّتْ حَجَّةَ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ فَتَقُولُ لِزَوْجِهَا أَ حِجَّنِي مَرَّةً أُخْرَى أَ لَهُ أَنْ يَمْنَعَهَا قَالَ «نَعَمْ يَقُولُ لَهَا حَقِّي عَلَيْكِ أَعْظَمُ مِنْ حَقِّكِ عَلَيَّ فِي ذَا ».

segments:
Hadith.2909 - Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Ibrahim (as), who said:
I asked him about a wealthy woman who had already performed the Hajj of Islam but said to her husband, "Take me for Hajj again." Can he prevent her from going?
Imam (as) said: "Yes, he can say to her, 'My right over you is greater than your right over me in this matter.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2909 - Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Ibrahim (as), who said:
I asked him about a wealthy woman who had already performed the Hajj of Islam but said to her husband, "Take me for Hajj again." Can he prevent her from going?
Imam (as) said: "Yes, he can say to her, 'My right over you is greater than your right over me in this matter.'"

narratorChain.raw: 2909 - وَ رَوَى إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
